title: El Futuro Simple
summary: Regular future formation (the whole infinitive plus one ending set shared by -ar/-er/-ir alike), the 12 irregular stems grouped into d-insertion, vowel-drop, and truncation families, the everyday use of the future for conjecture about the present (estará en casa), and a complete-enough-for-A1 introduction to periphrastic future (ir a + infinitivo) ahead of its full treatment in Chapter 45.
